chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P.No.D- 3721 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For Katcha Peshi. 3. For hearing of MA 16260/2017. 16.01.2018. Mr. Masood Rasool Babar Memon, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional A.G. alongwith Inspector Manzoor Ali on behalf of DIGP Hyderabad, Inspector Nooruddin incharge CIA Jamshoro, SIP Liaquat Ali SHO Chhachar, SIP Muhammad Yasin Serio SHO Thebath, Inspector Malik Riaz SHO Manjhand and ASI Nisar Ahmed Mallah CIA Jamshoro. = It is stated by the counsel for the petitioner that the official respondents at the behest of respondent No.13 are harassing the petitioner without any justification and at his instance they have lodged number of FIRs against the relatives of the petitioner and according to him the investigation officers of those FIRs are not investigating the matter properly. This fact has been denied by the police officials present in court today and submits that the petitioner has nothing to do with the said FIRs and that the relatives of the petitioners are indulged in selling narcotics and other offences. Learned A.A.G. files the comments on behalf of respondents No.4, 5, 6, 8, 9 and 12, which are taken on record and copies whereof have been supplied to the counsel for the petitioner. Since the main grievance of the petitioner is that official respondents may be directed to act strictly in accordance with law, the learned A.A.G. present in court states that the official respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law. In view of the above, this petition stands disposed of alongwith pending application with direction to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law.

Since the main grievance of the petitioner is that official respondents may be directed to act strictly in accordance with law, the learned A.A.G. present in court states that the official respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law. In view of the above, this petition stands disposed of alongwith pending application with direction to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE Tufail
